primary_sources.title: Various Whistleblower Protection prosecutions of Rafizi 2014-2017 (most acquittals)
T4A issues 1990 (ARM chip MACC referral) and 1993 (resignations 17 May 2026)

notes: Reformist PKR figure. Lost PKR deputy-presidency race to Nurul Izzah Anwar by more than 2:1 (May 2025). Resigned as Economy Minister; lost Pandan seat 18 May 2026 (T4A issue 1993). Has been openly critical of MADANI government; supplied 28 pages of evidence to MACC over ARM chip RM1.1B deal 14 May 2026 (T4A issue 1990). Took over Parti Bersama Malaysia. The most consequential dissident inside PKR's reform tradition since Anwar himself.
